name: facefusion-local
description: Run FaceFusion workflows through MCP tools, resources, and prompts, including fuller capability exposure, built-in presets, headless execution, interactive UI launch, plan visualization, confirmation-gated install/setup, and multi-actor orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Drive FaceFusion from Codex with headless and UI workflows.
interface.longDescription: FaceFusion MCP exposes a local FaceFusion installation as an MCP server with executable tools, stable reference resources, and workflow prompts for environment prep, confirmation-gated install/setup, direct media processing, expanded capability discovery, reusable presets, interactive UI launch, multi-actor plan visualization, job orchestration, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my local FaceFusion install is ready to run.
Run a FaceFusion face swap on local media files.
Create and manage a FaceFusion batch job workflow.
Coordinate a multi-actor FaceFusion project with preview approval.
